paths.notes: This file itself. Only writable by `code-architect owners bootstrap` or `owners migrate`; never a general edit target.
Config dir for CA-managed lockfiles + contracts. Run.lock is handled atomically by safe-json; humans review anything else. (No .kameha/ dir exists today — defensive entry.)
Dashboard runtime SQLite + -wal/-shm sidecars at repo root. Gitignored. Lead Engine writes via dashboard backend; CA must never touch — sidecar writes corrupt the DB.
Archer/classify batch reports — prospect outreach drafts. Contains prospect PII (names, companies, contact context). Gitignored. Runtime only; CA never writes.
Runtime logs (claude_usage.csv, delegation_processed.json, indeed_dedup_log.json, *_last_fetch.json). Gitignored. Lead Engine's daemons write; CA never.
Live smoke-test CSVs with real prospect data (live_smoke_cynthia.csv, live_smoke_gina.csv, live_batch_*.csv). Gitignored per .gitignore. Prospect PII; never CA-writable.
Live credentials (Claude API, HubSpot, Instantly, Gmail, Eventbrite, Yelp, etc). Gitignored. Never CA-writable.
Example env file (committed). Schema for required env vars; humans review additions/removals.
Lead-engine knowledge base (legal exposure + brand vocabulary, etc). Owned by the lead-engine agent; CA may read for graph-walk but never writes. Currently untracked (1 file).

Top-level pytest tree (test_archer_tracks.py, test_batch_report.py, test_competitive_monitor.py, sample fixtures). Mechanical refactors common; DA-gated. The tests/live_*.csv carve-out above takes precedence for the PII fixtures.
Dashboard pytest tree. Mechanical refactors common; DA-gated.

Shared library code (hubspot_client.py, claude_retry.py, instantly_client.py, kai_notifications.py, delegation.py, inbox_processor.py, signal_common.py, research-intel.md). API-client surface + cross-module helpers. Conservative: humans review until specific sub-lanes are carved out (CA tends to whitelist scripts/lib/** but Lead Engine's shared/ also wires HubSpot/Instantly client calls — too load-bearing for auto-merge).
36 externalized Claude prompt templates (archer_*, scout_*, closer_*). Drives client-facing copy generation; brand voice + ICP rubric encoded here. Humans review every change.
Scout module (csv_parser, enrichment, scoring, hubspot_push, batch_report, warm_intro, radar_signal_integration). Touches HubSpot writes + ICP scoring; humans review.

fallback.notes: Default-deny posture: anything not matched above (CLAUDE.md, LANGUAGE.md, top-level skills/, ad-hoc files) requires human review. Lead Engine has no general-purpose library lane like scripts/lib/ — shared/ is too API-client-heavy to auto-merge.
